SAFETY OF THE ACFT IN THE FLW AREA MAY BE AFFECTED:
102900N1092300E - 112300N1093100E - 112000N1095300E - 
101600N1094600E, POINTS CONNECTION RANGE
VERTICAL ALTITUDE: SFC-UNL
1. DRG THIS ACTIVITY, ATS RTE SEGMENTS AND EN-ROUTE HLDG 
MENTIONED BELOW ARE NOT USED:
- M771: SUDUN - DAMVO - DOXAR
- N500: AGSIS - DAMVO - MIMUX
- M765: SAMAP - MAPNO
- EN-ROUTE HLDG: DAMVO
2. DRG THIS ACTIVITY, ATS RTE SEGMENTS MENTIONED BELOW SHALL 
BE OPERATED AS FLW:
- ACFT ON M771: M771 - DAGAG - AGSIS - CRA - NITOM - M771
- ACFT ON N892 - N500 TO VVTS: N892 - MESOX - Q15 - CRA - W15
- ACFT ON N500 TO VVTS AND VICE VERSA: N500 - PANDI - AGSAM - 
OSIXA - DAGAG - ELSAS - M768 OR N500 - PANDI - AGSAM - MIMUX 
- CRA - PTH
- OVERFLIGHT ACFT ON N500 AND VICE VERSA: N500 - PANDI - 
AGSAM - OSIXA - DAGAG - M768 - TSH
- OVERFLIGHT ACFT ON M765 AND VICE VERSA: M765 - IGARI - 
DAGAG - OSIXA - ALDAS - M765
- FL310, FL350, FL390 WILL BE APPLIED TO ACFT ON ATS RTE M771
- FL320, FL360, FL400 WILL BE APPLIED TO ACFT ON ATS RTE L642
REMARKS:
- ALL ACFT SHALL AVOID THE AFFECTED AREA OR SUBJ TO ATC 
CLEARANCES
- THE AEROSPACE FLIGHT END PART 1 OF 2
